name: Sprout of Control
short_description: Sprout of Control is a puzzle-game that requires wits, patience and timing. You can move in any direction as long as it is not occupied, but while moving, you can't change direction until you hit another solid object. Crawl your way through the levels and use evil fireflies to your advantage!
detailed_description:
Embark on a puzzling journey with Sprout of Control. Guide your vine-like character through complex levels, where strategic planning and precise timing are crucial for success. But beware of the evil fireflies! Will they set you ablaze and make your life miserable, or will you outsmart them and turn their fire against them?

Key features:
  • Engaging puzzles that test your wits, patience, and timing.
  • Over 50 meticulously crafted levels filled with mind-bending challenges.
  • Interactive level selection for seamless navigation.
  • Customize your experience with a game speed slider, allowing players to enjoy the game at their own pace.
  • Hunt for collectibles scattered throughout levels for the true completionists.

Immerse yourself in the captivating world of Sprout of Control. Whether you're a casual gamer, a puzzle aficionado, or an achievement hunter, this game promises to satisfy your craving for challenge and entertainment!
